acceptance.assertion: Workspace parsing accepts the current schema-versioned Bureau result envelope and rejects ambiguous or legacy-only shapes fail-closed.
Tests cover current envelope, malformed envelope, nested result absence and backward-compatibility policy.
A formal workspace reaches ready using the deployed Bureau runtime contract.

goal: Make Agent Workspace consume the current Bureau result envelope without relying on the legacy unwrapped JSON shape.

does_not_establish: compatibility with unspecified future Bureau envelopes
acceptance of ambiguous legacy-only result shapes
completion of unrelated Agent Workspace roles
metadata.reason: PR #193 and PR #196 plus formal workspace live evidence resolved the Bureau envelope adapter degradation.

validation.github_ci: required validate (3.10) and validate (3.12) jobs passed on all cited implementation PRs

validated_acceptance.envelope-current: PR #193 normalizes the schema-versioned Bureau result envelope and fails closed on ambiguous shapes.
validated_acceptance.contract-tests: PR #193 adds current, malformed, missing-result and compatibility-policy regression coverage; both required GitHub validation jobs passed.
validated_acceptance.live-proof: The formal workspace gaw-agent-workspace-t0-grabowski-operator-sur-eaf95eed258b reached creation_state=ready against the deployed Bureau runtime and canonical runtime snapshot after PR #196.

metadata.verification_note: PR #193 implemented the envelope adapter contract, PR #196 repaired the production Git/snapshot path, and the formal workspace reached ready using the deployed Bureau result envelope.

title: Normalize Bureau result envelopes in Agent Workspace
